processed_sentences.text: API & Service Development: Design, build, and maintain highly scalable backend services and robust RESTful/GraphQL APIs using Node.js.
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Core backend responsibility with specific API styles and Node.js.

processed_sentences.text: Architecture Evolution: Develop microservices and event-driven applications to support high-throughput, low-latency business logic.
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Explicit architectural patterns (microservices, event-driven) with performance constraints.

processed_sentences.text: Data Management: Write optimized queries, design schemas, and manage data consistency across both relational (SQL) and non-relational (NoSQL) databases.
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Concrete database responsibilities across SQL and NoSQL with query/schema work.

processed_sentences.text: Cloud & Security: Deploy and maintain applications in cloud environments, implementing secure authentication/authorization protocols (e.g., OAuth, JWT) and data encryption.
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Cloud deployment plus concrete security protocols and encryption.

processed_sentences.text: Engineering Excellence: Drive application performance tuning, conduct rigorous code reviews, write automated tests, and support CI/CD pipeline automation.
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Quality and delivery practices with CI/CD; less specific than core stack but still differentiating.

processed_sentences.text: Language/Framework: Deep production experience with Node.js (and frameworks like Express, NestJS, or Fastify).
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Must-have core runtime and specific backend frameworks.

processed_sentences.text: Database Proficiency: Hands-on experience with both relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and non-relational (MongoDB, DynamoDB, Redis) databases.
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Must-have databases explicitly named across relational and non-relational.

processed_sentences.text: Cloud Infrastructure: Proven experience deploying and monitoring applications in a major cloud environment (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
processed_sentences.tier_reason: Must-have cloud deployment/monitoring with explicit cloud providers.

sentence_breakdown.sentence: API & Service Development: Design, build, and maintain highly scalable backend services and robust RESTful/GraphQL APIs using Node.js.
Architecture Evolution: Develop microservices and event-driven applications to support high-throughput, low-latency business logic.
Data Management: Write optimized queries, design schemas, and manage data consistency across both relational (SQL) and non-relational (NoSQL) databases.
Cloud & Security: Deploy and maintain applications in cloud environments, implementing secure authentication/authorization protocols (e.g., OAuth, JWT) and data encryption.
Engineering Excellence: Drive application performance tuning, conduct rigorous code reviews, write automated tests, and support CI/CD pipeline automation.
Language/Framework: Deep production experience with Node.js (and frameworks like Express, NestJS, or Fastify).
Database Proficiency: Hands-on experience with both relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and non-relational (MongoDB, DynamoDB, Redis) databases.
Cloud Infrastructure: Proven experience deploying and monitoring applications in a major cloud environment (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
Architectural Patterns: Clear understanding of microservices, event-driven architecture, and message brokers (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ, or AWS SQS).
Testing & Quality: Experience writing unit/integration tests (using Jest, Mocha, or Chai) and participating in CI/CD workflows.
Experience with TypeScript in a backend environment.
Familiarity with containerization tools like Docker and orchestration via Kubernetes.
Understanding of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools like Terraform.
